Projects.Name: Call for Action
Projects.Oneliner: A game where you complete menial tasks within a timelimit or else get punished
Projects.Description: This project was created by me as a solo developer in 36 hours during a gamejam hosted by Study assotiation XP. In this game you complete small tasks before the timer runs out on said task. If you fail 3 in 1 day, the day will end and you will get 1 strike. If you get 3 strikes you are out. Every day, more tasks will be added with different time limits and different difficulty levels. On day 5, no more tasks will be added, but the time you have on each task will be shortened. The tasks are not difficult, but remember! If you need help, you can always call 6.

Projects.Name: Shadows of Singraven
Projects.Oneliner: A puzzle, horror game about the legend of 'De non van Singraven'.
Projects.Description: This game was created for Project Tweeduuster. A project set up by Mark Boerrichter to bring the myths and legends from the Twente region of the Netherlands to the new generation. In this project we worked with a multi-diciplinary team of 10 people of Artist, Designer and Engineer roles. In this game, you play as a one of the last witchhunters in the netherlands and you have been tasked to find out what has happening at Singraven Manor. The game itself is a small first-person semi-open-world puzzle horror game created in Unreal Engine 5.4

Projects.Name: Tower of Masks
Projects.Oneliner: A 2D, Topdown puzzle game where you use the abilties of masks to get through rooms.
Projects.Description: This game was made during Global Gamejam 2026 with as theme Mask. The game itself is a 2D, Top-Down, puzzle game where you have to use the power of the masks to get through the different rooms.

Projects.Name: Before the Storm
Projects.Oneliner: A game where you try to get as many animals back to the barn before the storm arives.
Projects.Description: This game was created by me as a solo developer for the GameJam hosted by studie association XP in 2024 with the theme 'Can't save them all'. In the game you lasso the sheep and cows, and pick up the chickens to bring as many of them back to the barn before the storm. It uses physics for the lassoëd animals to create very goofy gameplay.

Projects.Name: Chipi's Show
Projects.Oneliner: Chipi the cat needs to entertain the croud by performing tricks on the stage.
Projects.Description: This game was created during Global GameJam 2024 with the theme 'Make me laugh'. I made it together with my girlfriend, who did all the art for the game while i did all programming. In this game, you play as chipi and need to entertain the crowd by doing tricks on stage. These present themselves as minigames. 'Juggeling' where you have to press keyboard keys in the right order. 'Uni-cycle balancing' where you need to keep the large bar over the small bar, and 'Whoopy couchen' where you have to spam space bar to blow it up.

Projects.Name: Lux et Nox
Projects.Oneliner: 2 cats make their way through a dungeon. one can't touch light, the other cannot touch darkness.
Projects.Description: This game was created for Global GameJam 2022. In this co-op game, you and a friend play as cats Lux and Nox. Lux can't touch the dark, Nox can't touch the light. Together you will have to make your way through all the levels.

Projects.Name: XP Wolves
Projects.Oneliner: A bot made for study assotiation XP to play werewolves for a week long in discord.

Projects.Name: Identification Station
Projects.Oneliner: You are an artificer working to figure out what the wizards have made this time...
Projects.Description: This game was created for a GameJam hosted by the study 'Creative Media & Game Technology' with as theme 'Identity'. In the game, you play as an artificer who identifies magical objects created by the wizards. You do this by using artifacts (Minigames). These minigames are 'Simon Says', 'Stardew Fishing minigame', and 'Timing'.

Projects.Name: Brewconomy
Projects.Oneliner: You're a potion seller, brewing potions and selling them to all different types of people
Projects.Description: This game was made in 3 weeks for a school project. In the game you have to brew potions on request of your customers, in between days you'll have to refill your stock and read the newspaper to see for upcomming events where certain potions will be more desired.

Projects.Name: Bariatric care
Projects.Oneliner: A VR simulation, simulating a supermarket to help people who had a stoumach reduction learn how to shop healthier.
Projects.Description: This project was made my internship at Saxion XR Lab. it is a VR simulation, simulating a supermarket to help people who had a stoumach reduction learn how to shop healthier.

Projects.Name: Reintegration after burnout
Projects.Oneliner: A simulation for employers to feel like how it is to have burnout.
Projects.Description: This project was made my internship at Saxion XR Lab. It is a combination of 3 projects where i primarily focussed on the 'perspective swich'. This VR experience in meant for employers to feel what it is like to suffer from burnout. This is done by both visual and sound indicator like a raised heart rate, sences like sound and light becomming louder and brighter and a constant flow of more and more information or tasks they would have to do. This all ending with the video you see when hovering over the thumbnail image, where your partner is mad at you that you are always working. All this combined makes for a very immersive experience which really gives you perspective on what it is like to have burnout.

Projects.Name: AR Route app
Projects.Oneliner: An app created for Enschede Promotie. It is used for people to walk through Enschede and use their camera to show what some buildings used to look like
Projects.Description: An app created for Enschede Promotie. It is used for people to walk through Enschede and use their camera to show what some buildings used to look like.

Projects.Name: Portfolio Website
Projects.Oneliner: The website you currently find yourself on
Projects.Description: This website i made as a way for me to learn how to work with NextJS and TailwindCSS. I feel like i gained a good base knowledge of how to work with these frameworks now.

Projects.Name: Hour Registration Website (Betapool)
Projects.Oneliner: Updating and managing the front-end of a website used by Saxion Univeristy for hour registration.
Projects.Description: This was a project that i did for Saxion University of Aplied Science. The website meant for hour registration by the students working for Saxion Studentpool. Prior to us updating the website, it worked on AngularJS. I updated it to Angular 14 and reworked everything to propperly function.
